label: Boda Rider
description: Motorcycle courier for short urban hops; door-to-door.

label: Matatu SACCO
description: Shared-taxi SACCO parcel desk service between towns.

label: Bus
description: Scheduled long-distance bus parcel service via the bus office.

description: Branch-network courier with nationwide office coverage.

label: Cargo Truck
description: Lorry or pickup freight for bulky or heavy consignments.
